payload.expression: SELECT (o.latest_message_at IS NOT NULL AND (r.last_read_at IS NULL OR o.latest_message_at > r.last_read_at)) AS unread FROM obj_0c8a7b10_1111_4a00_8000_000000000101 o LEFT JOIN obj_0c8a7b10_1111_4a00_8000_000000000103 r ON r.thread_id = o.item_id AND r.user_id = {{params.viewer}} WHERE o.item_id = {{params.self}}

params.name: self
params.description: The ch-thread row's item id (bound from the row).

payload.description: ch-thread.hasUnread (perViewer) — true when the thread's latestMessageAt is newer than this viewer's ch-thread-read.lastReadAt (or the viewer has no read-state row).
